description: Add a searchable + filterable exercise library surface on top of the existing TrainingProgramData.allExercises catalog (~50 exercises in the v1 program; ~87 unique post-import-training-plan v1 mapper). Today the catalog is consumed silently — TrainingPlanView shows the day's exercises but there's no UI to discover all available exercises, filter by muscle/equipment/category, or search by name. C3 builds a sheet-based ExerciseLibraryView with: (a) live text search across name + muscle keywords, (b) horizontal scrolling filter chips for muscle group + equipment + category, (c) one-tap exercise detail with coaching cue + sets/reps/rest, (d) optional 'add to today' affordance gated on the v2 training surface. Closes backlog L347 (RICE 8.0, 2-3d Feature 9-phase).

dependencies_met.ExerciseDefinition_schema: shipped (Models/TrainingProgramData.swift — id, name, category, equipment, muscleGroups, targetSets, targetReps, restSeconds, coachingCue, dayType, order, progressionNote)
dependencies_met.ExerciseMapper: shipped (Services/Import/ExerciseMapper.swift — full-text mapping from external plan imports)
dependencies_met.Settings v2 sheet patterns: shipped (SettingsDetailScaffold + SettingsSectionCard reusable for the library detail row)
dependencies_met.ChipRow component or equivalent: RESOLVED at Phase 1 — AppPickerChip + AppFilterBar already exist in FitTracker/DesignSystem/AppComponents.swift; no new primitive needed.

scope_known_gaps.no_existing_search_index: Catalog is a 50-element array — linear scan is fast enough; no FTS / Core Data index needed for v1.
scope_known_gaps.no_existing_filter_chip_component: AppComponents may or may not have a chip; verify in Phase 1 (PRD) and either reuse or add as a single new component.
scope_known_gaps.no_existing_navigation_entrypoint: Must add entry point — likely from Training tab (Library button on TrainingPlanView) and/or Settings → Training & Nutrition.
scope_known_gaps.no_routing_to_add_to_plan: C3 ships a discovery + browse surface. The 'add to active program' action is GATED by C6 (Training program customization) data model — out of scope for C3.

success_metrics: Exercise library opens per WAU (T1, baseline 0 → target >=0.30 at T+30d)
Chip-tap session rate (T1, target >=40% of library sessions)
Power-user no-library complaints stop (T3, within 30d post-ship)

Crash rate on library sheet > 0.5% of opens

Phase 0 §7 chip-component question RESOLVED: AppPickerChip + AppFilterBar already exist. Picker-mode init signature defined for C6 reuse: ExerciseLibraryView(picker: ((ExerciseDefinition) -> Void)? = nil). 4 new training_-prefixed analytics events. ~600 LoC est (4 new + 5 modified). Phase E compliant.
